name: full-team-website
description: Complete website build from idea to launch: the /solo:full-team-dev flow staffed with 21 staged seats plus the stage-independent memory steward — 22 seat definitions total across 14 stages including finalize; every staged persona/mechanical seat maps to a shipped room-* agent. Seats with applies_to run only for matching project profiles; every skipped seat needs an evidence-backed N/A reason (and a finalizer-minted N/A gate-evidence record) in the run report.
based_on_room: Planning + Build + Integration + QA + Hardening + Growth + Launch rooms combined
rules: one writer per artifact per stage, computed over declared PLUS implicit command writes — shared memory (tasks/decisions/handoff) is written ONLY by the memory steward; every other seat submits proposals
context is explicit — each seat reads only its listed files, plus .solo/handoff.md
every seat ends with a handoff checked by /ai:handoff-check before the next stage starts

code-writing seats work in ISOLATED worktrees (their agents declare isolation: worktree) under the room's `worktrees` execution contract: BASE_SHA is recorded before spawning (worktree agents branch from the DEFAULT branch, not the parent HEAD), every builder returns worktree_path/branch/clean commit_sha/tests/proposal, and the integrator merges those EXACT SHAs into ONE integration commit (integration/<run_id>) BEFORE review — reviewers never review unmerged parallel work

every seat from review onward first verifies `git rev-parse HEAD` equals the appropriate SHA carried in untracked .solo/run-state/<run_id>.json (run-state-v1 contract, written only by update_run_state.py; INTEGRATION_SHA for review/QA/hardening, FINAL_SHA for finalize/gate — mechanically: `update_run_state.py verify integration|final`) before doing any work — evidence gathered at any other commit is invalid and check_evidence.py will reject it

EVIDENCE LIFECYCLE: specialists produce raw artifacts and N/A candidates only; ALL tracked memory updates (tasks, decisions, risks, /solo:handoff-memory) happen BEFORE the freeze; the ORCHESTRATOR executes the structured evidence.freeze contract (after the docs stage, before finalize): commits all tracked code, docs, release plans and project memory, verifies a clean tree, and records FINAL_SHA with update_run_state.py advance final (run-state-v1 — SHA derived from git by the helper, monotonic, frozen once set) in untracked .solo/run-state/<run_id>.json; after the freeze NOTHING tracked changes — the evidence_finalizer mints records (untracked) and the gatekeeper is output-only; the memory steward never runs at or after the finalizer (memory_steward.active_through_stage = 'docs')

no specialist writes gate-evidence records mid-flow; the evidence_finalizer regenerates the FULL set at FINAL_SHA via /gate:finalize-evidence, and the gatekeeper verifies it with check_evidence.py (which derives HEAD itself)
vendor audits (/stack:audit-*) run only for providers recorded in .solo/stack.md; each skipped audit or profile-skipped seat is reported as N/A with the evidence for why
state-changing browser tests (/browser:smoke-test, /browser:form-submit-test) are manual-only — the browser_qa seat runs the read-only modes and asks the human to run the rest
no evidence, no finding — audits follow the evidence-based output format

memory_steward.merge_policy: single writer for shared memory: parallel seats submit proposals (.solo/proposals/<seat>-<run_id>.md); the steward merges them, allocates unique T-IDs, merges decisions/handoffs, and reports conflicts; active_through_stage = 'docs' is the structured cutoff — the steward's LAST merge happens after the docs stage and before the freeze commit, and the runner MUST NOT invoke it at or after the evidence_finalizer stage

seats.deliverable: PRD with MVP scope, non-goals, testable acceptance criteria; stack recorded (raw artifacts only — all gate-evidence records are minted later by the evidence finalizer at FINAL_SHA)
Codebase map + risk map for an existing repo (skipped with N/A reason for greenfield)
Architecture + API/data/env contracts (raw artifacts only — no gate-evidence records mid-flow)
Core flows incl. empty/loading/error states, component system, task breakdown; before-code gate GO (raw artifacts only — no gate-evidence records mid-flow)
Working UI per task in an ISOLATED worktree; decisions proposed to steward
Working API/services per task in an ISOLATED worktree; decisions proposed to steward
Schema + reversible migrations matching the data contract in an ISOLATED worktree; decisions proposed to steward (raw artifacts only — no gate-evidence records mid-flow)

All three build worktrees merged into ONE integration branch — conflicts resolved, builds green; INTEGRATION_SHA recorded via update_run_state.py advance integration (run-state-v1, derived from HEAD by the helper) in untracked .solo/run-state/<run_id>.json — so review sees the combined change

seats.role: Code Reviewer + UI Reviewer (different model than implementers)
seats.deliverable: Review verdict on the MERGED integration branch + post-implementation UI review (raw artifacts only — no gate-evidence records mid-flow)
Hallucination / missing-file / handoff audit of all agent output this cycle
Tests passing incl. edge cases, results in .solo/tests.md (raw artifacts only — no gate-evidence records mid-flow)
Real-browser evidence: console, layout, 320/375/768; asks the human to run the manual-only smoke/form submission tests (raw artifacts only — no gate-evidence records mid-flow)

Threat model and authz matrix in .solo/risks.md; when RLS applies, include a human handoff for the manual-only /security:rls-test against a disposable test tenant (raw artifacts only — no gate-evidence records mid-flow)

Evidence-based findings with fix order; vendor audits (/stack:audit-*) run per stack.md; performance/SEO/analytics N/A CANDIDATES (profile evidence) handed to the evidence finalizer — records themselves are minted only by the finalizer at FINAL_SHA
Funnel/conversion audit for user-facing conversion-oriented sites
Clean commits, PR review, before-merge gate GO
CI pipeline + monitoring/alerting wired and recorded in .solo/monitoring.md (raw artifacts only — no gate-evidence records mid-flow)
Preflight, deploy + rollback plans, before-deploy gate GO (raw artifacts only — no gate-evidence records mid-flow)
Docs matched to what actually ships (written AFTER release.md exists) + release notes; completion proposed to handoff (raw artifacts only — no gate-evidence records mid-flow)

seats.agent_note: mechanical re-execution of every category command at FINAL_SHA via record_evidence.py — a disciplined executor, not a persona; runs /gate:finalize-evidence and nothing else
seats.deliverable: Verifies HEAD equals the FINAL_SHA recorded in UNTRACKED .solo/run-state/<run_id>.json (run-state-v1, written by update_run_state.py; verified mechanically with `update_run_state.py verify final`) by the orchestrator's freeze (never a tracked file), then produces ALL 14 gate-evidence records against it (verified via record_evidence.py, or matrix-permitted N/A via record_evidence.py --not-applicable) — no record exists from any earlier, intermediate commit; refuses to change anything tracked

OUTPUT-ONLY after finalization: verifies git rev-parse HEAD equals the FINAL_SHA in untracked .solo/run-state/<run_id>.json, runs check_evidence.py (self-derived HEAD), and issues the verdict in its OUTPUT — zero tracked writes; blockers reopen work in the NEXT cycle before a new freeze
After every stage: merge proposals into shared memory, allocate unique T-IDs, merge decisions/handoffs, flag conflicts

exit_criteria: check_evidence.py exits 0 (all 14 categories verified or recognized-N/A at the current commit + environment) and the production-ready gate returns SAFE TO LAUNCH (or SAFE WITH WARNINGS explicitly accepted by the user)

base_sha.recorded_by: the orchestrator (parent session) COMMITS the planning memory (.solo/ intake/PRD/architecture/contracts/design/tasks) FIRST, then records BASE_SHA with the gate plugin's update_run_state.py helper (`advance base` — the helper derives it from git rev-parse HEAD itself; run-state-v1, exact lowercase keys) into UNTRACKED .solo/run-state/<run_id>.json — never into a tracked file (a commit cannot contain its own SHA)
base_sha.rule: Claude worktree agents branch from the DEFAULT branch, not the parent session HEAD — every builder first fast-forwards onto the recorded base (`git merge --ff-only <BASE_SHA>`, or rebases) and verifies `git merge-base --is-ancestor <BASE_SHA> HEAD` before writing any code

worktrees.proposal_transport: each builder COMMITS its payload as .solo/proposals/<seat>-<run_id>.json inside its own branch (clean tree: git status --porcelain empty; commit_sha = git rev-parse HEAD). Worktrees share the repository object store, so the integrator reads every branch and payload via `git show <commit_sha>:.solo/proposals/<seat>-<run_id>.json` — no cross-worktree file copying

freeze.commits: all tracked code, CI config, release plans, docs/ and project memory (tasks/decisions/risks/handoff, merged by the steward's LAST run) in ONE freeze commit
freeze.verifies: git status --porcelain is empty outside the untracked runtime dirs (.solo/gate-evidence/, .solo/run-state/) — a dirty tree aborts the freeze
freeze.records: FINAL_SHA of the freeze commit, recorded with update_run_state.py advance final — the helper derives it from git rev-parse HEAD itself (run-state-v1; monotonic; frozen once set)

assumes_preexisting..solo/project.md: project profile + intake recorded by /solo:start-session and /stack:intake in an earlier session; read by the PM and the evidence finalizer, produced by neither
